description_long: This is a compact teardrop-style camper trailer with a smooth, rounded roof and a two-tone exterior featuring a white upper section and a light teal lower section. The camper has a single entry door with a circular window on the right side, positioned toward the front, and two large rectangular windows—one on each side—providing ample natural light inside. The front of the camper is slightly sloped, with a small rectangular window, and the rear is curved without any visible openings. The camper is mounted on a single axle with two black wheels and has a tow bar extending from the front for attachment to a vehicle. The exterior appears to be made primarily of metal or fiberglass panels, with rubber tires and glass windows. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A compact, teardrop-shaped camper trailer with a white and teal exterior, large side windows, and a single entry door on the right side. It features a rounded roof, black wheels, and a front tow bar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped front face with a small rectangular window and the tow bar extending forward.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the entry door with a circular window, a large rectangular side window, and the wheel beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the curved, windowless back and the tow bar visible underneath.
description_view_3: Left side view with two large rectangular windows and a wheel, but no door.
attribute_window_configuration: one small rectangular window on the front, one large rectangular window on each side
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front
